all.en: The following guidelines outline the company approach to telework and remote work arrangements.
all.zh: 以下準則說明公司對於遠距工作與居家辦公安排的方針。

all.en: These guidelines apply to all full-time and part-time employees across our global offices.
all.zh: 本準則適用於我們全球辦公室的所有全職與兼職員工。

all.en: Remote work is considered a flexible arrangement rather than an entitlement.
all.zh: 遠距工作被視為一項彈性安排，而非權利。

all.en: Each request must be approved by the employee direct manager and reviewed periodically.
all.zh: 每項申請須由員工直屬主管核准，並定期重新審視。

all.en: Eligibility depends on job responsibilities, performance, and the nature of team collaboration.
all.zh: 申請資格取決於工作職責、績效以及團隊合作的性質。

all.en: Roles that require physical presence, such as lab work, are not eligible for telework.
all.zh: 需要實際到場的職務，例如實驗室工作，不適用遠距辦公。

all.en: Employees who work remotely are expected to maintain the same standards of productivity.
all.zh: 遠距工作的員工應維持與在辦公室相同的生產力標準。

all.en: Core collaboration hours are defined as ten in the morning to four in the afternoon.
all.zh: 核心協作時間定義為上午十點至下午四點。

all.en: During these hours, employees should be available for meetings and timely communication.
all.zh: 在這些時段內，員工應隨時可參與會議並進行即時溝通。

all.en: A reliable internet connection of at least twenty-five megabits per second is required.
all.zh: 需具備至少每秒二十五兆位元的穩定網路連線。

all.en: Employees are responsible for ensuring a safe and ergonomic home workspace.
all.zh: 員工須自行確保居家工作空間的安全與符合人體工學。

all.en: The company provides a one-time stipend for the purchase of basic ergonomic equipment.
all.zh: 公司會提供一次性補助，供購置基本的人體工學設備。

all.en: Approved equipment includes office chairs, monitor stands, and external keyboards.
all.zh: 可申請的設備包括辦公椅、螢幕支架與外接鍵盤。

all.en: Receipts must be submitted through the expense system within sixty days of purchase.
all.zh: 收據須於購買後六十日內透過費用報銷系統提交。

all.en: Sensitive company information should only be accessed through the secure virtual private network.
all.zh: 敏感公司資訊僅可透過安全的虛擬私人網路存取。

all.en: Public Wi-Fi networks are not approved for confidential work or client data handling.
all.zh: 公共 Wi-Fi 網路不可用於機密工作或處理客戶資料。

all.en: All work devices must remain locked when not actively in use, even at home.
all.zh: 即便在家，所有工作裝置在未使用時亦須上鎖。

all.en: Employees should refrain from printing confidential documents in shared household spaces.
all.zh: 員工應避免在家中共用空間列印機密文件。

all.en: Remote workers must visit the assigned office at least two days per calendar month.
all.zh: 遠距工作者每月至少須回到指定辦公室上班兩天。

all.en: These visits help maintain team relationships and support cross-functional collaboration.
all.zh: 這些到訪有助於維繫團隊關係並支援跨部門合作。

all.en: Travel expenses for these required visits are reimbursable up to the standard daily limit.
all.zh: 上述必要到訪所產生的差旅費可在標準每日限額內請款。

all.en: Managers should hold weekly check-ins with each of their remote team members.
all.zh: 主管應與每位遠距團隊成員每週進行一次簡短會議。

all.en: If circumstances change, employees are encouraged to discuss adjustments with their manager.
all.zh: 若情況有變，鼓勵員工與主管討論調整方案。

all.en: These guidelines will be reviewed annually to reflect evolving business and employee needs.
all.zh: 本準則將每年檢討，以反映業務與員工需求的變化。
